race.comment: KAPOLEI (9) led to the turn over 1200m at Ballarat last time out but faded to finish sixth. Has the pace to be in a prominent position from the outset. Now in the Blake Ryan yard and best form puts her right in this. THERE SHE GOES (6) did little and finished thirteenth over 1300m at Dubbo last start, a less impressive effort than her sixth at Bathurst the run before. Perfectly placed and is sure to take a ton of beating. THE GIT UP (8) was in the money two starts back at Gulgong but couldn't back it up last time when ninth over 1100m at Narromine. Has her share of ability and can do a lot better. CHAMP DE MARS (1) is stepping out at this track for the first time. Last appeared when she finished seventh over 1100m at Dubbo on June 28. Fitter and look for an improved run.
